testName: verifying that a post can be successfully created with valid data
title: A Valid Post Title
content: This is a valid post content that meets all requirements.

testName: verifying that creating a post fails when the title is missing
content: Content remains but title is gone.

testName: verifying that creating a post fails when the content is missing
title: Title remains but content is gone.

testName: verifying that creating a post fails when the title is an empty string
verifying that creating a post fails when the content is a blank string
title: Valid Title

testName: verifying that creating a post fails when the title exceeds the character limit
title: This title is intentionally made very long to exceed the 255 character limit usually imposed on string columns in relational databases like H2 or MySQL. Let's see if the validation accurately catches this and prevents a database error by returning a 400 instead of a 500.
